name: bandit.scout_stalker_smoked_watcher_live
description: Defended-camp sight/smoke hardening row: start from the active scout/stalker sight-avoid fixture with fd_smoke saved on the watcher tile, then advance two live local turns and require same-run local_gate plus sight_avoid artifacts showing the lead is smoke-obscured, shakedown/combat stay off, and the watcher either moves by bounded adjacent local pathing or records a concrete no-passable-candidate blocker instead of silently camping the smoked tile.

steps.label: post_load_smoked_watcher_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the smoked active bandit scout/stalker fixture; this proves only startup/load and before-action footing

steps.label: preflight_saved_smoked_active_scout_site_and_member_footing
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not prove an active scout group with findable saved active-member NPC footing

steps.label: preflight_saved_smoke_on_active_watcher_tile
steps.abort_reason: saved map metadata did not contain fd_smoke on the active watcher tile before the live smoke-out probe
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-save metadata contains fd_smoke on the saved active watcher tile before any live smoke-obscured behavior credit

steps.label: preflight_saved_smoked_watcher_game_turn_baseline
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved player turn counter is recorded before the two visible local turns

steps.label: disable_safe_mode_for_smoked_watcher_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode has been toggled so the two visible local turns can advance under player control

steps.label: advance_visible_turn_1_for_smoked_watcher
steps.expected_visible_fact: first visible local turn after smoke footing has completed; final feature credit still depends on same-run smoke-obscured local_gate/sight_avoid artifact

steps.label: advance_visible_turn_2_for_smoked_watcher
steps.expected_visible_fact: second visible local turn after smoke footing has completed; feature credit requires same-run smoke-obscured local_gate plus bounded adjacent reposition or explicit blocked-reposition hold evidence

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_smoked_watcher_probe
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the smoked watcher probe, proving the game remained responsive

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_smoked_watcher_probe
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the smoked watcher probe

steps.label: audit_saved_game_turn_delta_after_smoked_watcher_probe
steps.abort_reason: saved player turn counter did not advance by at least two turns after the bounded visible-turn smoke-out probe

steps.label: audit_two_turn_smoked_watcher_local_gate_and_sight_avoid_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run live path did not emit claim-scoped smoke-obscured local_gate plus bounded sight_avoid reposition or explicit no-passable-candidate blocker artifact on the watcher tile/sightline smoke path
required_any_line_patterns: reason=blocked: smoke-obscured no adjacent passable reposition candidate

evidence_contract.claim: bandit scout/stalker smoke-out handling reaches the real live local-turn path: smoke on the watcher tile or sightline marks the lead obscured and the active watcher either bounded-repositions or records a concrete no-passable-candidate blocker without opening shakedown/combat-forward behavior
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for bandit smoke behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, saved smoke footing, input ledger, two visible local turns, turn delta, smoke-obscured local_gate artifact, and bounded adjacent sight_avoid reposition or explicit blocked-reposition artifact are not all green/matched.
